name: Emberforge Outpost
identity: Roadwarden service outpost focused on repairs, barracks life, and patrol support.
approach: Functional depot architecture with military-resupply emphasis.
inside: Repair tools, barracks routines, patrol briefings, and shrine visits structure daily activity.
expected_behavior: respect repair facilities and patrol maps
faith: Iron Beacon Shrine binds renewal and domination into road-protection symbolism.
seasonal_change: Traffic varies with patrol intensity and caravan pressure.
law_context: route safety and public-order sabotage law are strongly felt.
